Prior work has advanced activation-space localization and causal tracing, but modules that appear important in activation space may merely aggregate or amplify upstream signals rather than encode the target capability in their own parameters. To address this gap, we propose Weight Patching, a parameter-space intervention method for source-oriented analysis in paired same-architecture models that differ in how strongly they express a target capability under the inputs of interest. Given a base model and a behavior-specialized counterpart, Weight Patching replaces selected module weights from the specialized model into the base model under a fixed input. We instantiate the method on instruction following and introduce a framework centered on a vector-anchor behavioral interface that provides a shared internal criterion for whether a task-relevant control state has been formed or recovered in open-ended generation. Under this framework, the analysis reveals a hierarchy from shallow candidate source-side carriers to aggregation and routing modules, and further to downstream execution circuits. The recovered component scores can also guide mechanism-aware model merging, improving selective fusion across the evaluated expert combinations and providing additional external validation.
title_zh: 权重修补：迈向大语言模型中的源代码级机制定位
abstract_zh: 机制可解释性旨在将模型行为定位到其内部因果实现的组件上。以往的研究推进了激活空间定位和因果追踪方法，但某些在激活空间中看似重要的模块，可能仅是聚合或放大上游信号，而非在其自身参数中编码目标能力。为弥补这一不足，我们提出“权重修补”（Weight Patching）——一种参数空间的干预方法，用于在具有相同架构但表现出不同强度目标能力的配对模型中进行以源为导向的分析。给定一个基础模型及其行为特化的对应模型，权重修补在固定输入下，将特化模型中选定模块的权重替换至基础模型中。我们在指令遵循任务上实现了该方法，并引入了一个以向量锚点行为接口为核心的框架，该接口提供了一个共享的内部标准，用以判断在开放式生成过程中是否已形成或恢复与任务相关的控制状态。在此框架下，分析揭示出从浅层候选源端载体、到聚合与路由模块，再到下游执行电路的层级结构。此外，被恢复组件的得分还可指导具备机制感知能力的模型融合，提升在评估的专家组合间的选择性融合效果，并提供额外的外部验证。

title: Correct Prediction, Wrong Steps? Consensus Reasoning Knowledge Graph for Robust Chain-of-Thought Synthesis
authors: Zipeng Ling, Shuliang Liu, Shenghong Fu, Yuehao Tang, Seonil Son, Yao Wan, Xuming Hu
abstract: LLM reasoning traces suffer from complex flaws -- *Step Internal Flaws* (logical errors, hallucinations, etc.) and *Step-wise Flaws* (overthinking, underthinking), which vary by sample. A natural approach would be to provide ground-truth labels to guide LLMs' reasoning. Contrary to intuition, we show that this yields no improvement in reasoning ability. We then propose CRAFT, a unified framework that mitigates both types of Step flaws, which builds a Reasoning Knowledge Graph (RKG) based on the consensus parts of multiple candidate traces, and synthesizes a high-quality trace through topological generation. Our approach improves label-prediction accuracy by 10+% on average, and consistently outperforms all baselines across both logical and mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Further, detailed benchmark evaluation proves that our method also improves the quality of LLMs' reasoning traces in multiple dimensions.
title_zh: 正确预测，错误步骤？用于鲁棒性思维链合成的一致性推理知识图谱
abstract_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）的推理过程存在复杂的缺陷，包括*步骤内部缺陷*（如逻辑错误、幻觉等）和*步骤间缺陷*（如过度思考、思考不足），这些缺陷在不同样本间表现各异。一种直观的解决方法是提供真实标签来引导LLM的推理过程。然而，与直觉相反，我们发现这种方法并不能提升模型的推理能力。为此，我们提出了CRAFT——一个统一的框架，能够有效缓解上述两类步骤缺陷。该框架基于多个候选推理路径中达成共识的部分构建推理知识图谱（RKG），并通过拓扑生成机制合成高质量的推理路径。实验结果表明，我们的方法在平均层面将标签预测准确率提升了10%以上，并在逻辑推理与数学推理两大基准测试中持续优于所有基线模型。此外，详细的基准评估进一步证明，我们的方法在多个维度上显著提升了LLM推理路径的质量。

title: Towards Personalizing Secure Programming Education with LLM-Injected Vulnerabilities
authors: Matthew Frazier, Kostadin Damevski
abstract: According to constructivist theory, students learn software security more effectively when examples are grounded in their own code. Generic examples often fail to connect with students' prior work, limiting engagement and understanding. Advances in LLMs are now making it possible to automatically generate personalized examples by embedding security vulnerabilities directly into student-authored code. This paper introduces a method that uses LLMs to inject instances of specific Common Weakness Enumerations (CWEs) into students' own assignment code, creating individualized instructional materials. We present an agentic AI framework, using autonomous LLM-based agents equipped with task-specific tools to orchestrate injection, evaluation, ranking, and learning outcome generation. We report the experience of deploying this system in two undergraduate computer science courses (N=71), where students reviewed code samples containing LLM-injected vulnerabilities and completed a post-project survey. We compared responses with a baseline using a widely adopted set of generic security instructional materials. Students qualitatively reported finding CWE injections into their own code more relevant, clearer, and more engaging than the textbook-style examples. However, our quantitative findings revealed limited statistically significant differences, suggesting that while students valued the personalization, further studies and refinement of the approach are needed to establish stronger empirical support.
title_zh: 通过注入大语言模型漏洞实现个性化安全编程教育
abstract_zh: 根据建构主义理论，当示例基于学生自身的代码时，学生学习软件安全会更加有效。通用的示例往往难以与学生已有的工作建立联系，从而限制了他们的参与度和理解深度。如今，大型语言模型（LLMs）的发展使得能够自动将个性化示例生成成为可能，方法是将安全漏洞直接嵌入学生编写的代码中。本文提出了一种利用LLM将特定的通用弱点枚举（CWE）实例注入学生自身作业代码的方法，从而创建个性化的教学材料。我们设计了一个代理型AI框架，通过配备特定任务工具的自主LLM代理，实现漏洞注入、评估、排序以及学习成果生成的全流程协调。我们在两门本科生计算机科学课程中部署了该系统（共71名学生），让学生审阅包含LLM注入漏洞的代码样本，并完成项目后的调查问卷。我们将调查结果与使用广泛采用的通用安全教学材料的对照组进行了比较。学生在定性反馈中表示，将CWE漏洞注入到自己代码中的示例更具相关性、更清晰、也更吸引人，优于传统的教科书式示例。然而，我们的定量分析结果显示统计上显著的差异有限，表明尽管学生认可个性化带来的价值，但仍需进一步研究和优化该方法，以建立更强的实证支持。

title: CollabCoder: Plan-Code Co-Evolution via Collaborative Decision-Making for Efficient Code Generation
authors: Duy Tung Doan, Quang Huy Phung, Dzung Nguyen, Khac-Hoai Nam Bui
abstract: Automated code generation remains a persistent challenge in software engineering, as conventional multi-agent frameworks are often constrained by static planning, isolated execution, high computational overhead, and limited adaptability to complex tasks. This paper introduces CollabCoder, a novel Plan-Code Co-Evolution framework that improves code generation through dynamic multi-agent collaboration. The core idea is to design a collaborative decision-making process between the plan module and the code module to decide which module should be executed for the debugging process. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmarks demonstrate that CollabCoder consistently improves code quality and robustness across tasks. Importantly, CollabCoder achieves performance comparable to or exceeding current state-of-the-art methods while reducing computational overhead, with efficiency gains becoming more pronounced as benchmark difficulty increases. On the more challenging LiveCodeBench and xCodeEval benchmarks, our approach improves performance by 11-20% over strong baselines while reducing the number of API calls by an average of 4-10 per execution.
title_zh: CollabCoder：通过协作决策实现规划与代码的协同进化以实现高效的代码生成
abstract_zh: 自动化代码生成在软件工程中始终是一个持续存在的挑战，传统的多智能体框架往往受限于静态规划、孤立执行、高计算开销以及对复杂任务适应性不足等问题。本文提出了一种名为 CollabCoder 的新型“计划-代码协同演化”框架，通过动态的多智能体协作机制显著提升代码生成质量。其核心思想是设计计划模块与代码模块之间的协同决策过程，以决定在调试过程中由哪个模块优先执行。在多个广泛使用的基准测试上的大量实验表明，CollabCoder 在各类任务中均能持续提升代码的质量与鲁棒性。尤为重要的是，CollabCoder 在性能上达到甚至超越当前最先进的方法，同时显著降低计算开销；随着基准测试难度的增加，效率优势愈发明显。在更具挑战性的 LiveCodeBench 和 xCodeEval 基准测试中，我们的方法相比强基线模型性能提升达 11%-20%，且每次执行平均减少 4-10 次 API 调用。

title: Chain of Uncertain Rewards with Large Language Models for Reinforcement Learning
authors: Shentong Mo
abstract: Designing effective reward functions is a cornerstone of reinforcement learning (RL), yet it remains a challenging and labor-intensive process due to the inefficiencies and inconsistencies inherent in traditional methods. Existing methods often rely on extensive manual design and evaluation steps, which are prone to redundancy and overlook local uncertainties at intermediate decision points. To address these challenges, we propose the Chain of Uncertain Rewards (CoUR), a novel framework that integrates large language models (LLMs) to streamline reward function design and evaluation in RL environments. Specifically, our CoUR introduces code uncertainty quantification with a similarity selection mechanism that combines textual and semantic analyses to identify and reuse the most relevant reward function components. By reducing redundant evaluations and leveraging Bayesian optimization on decoupled reward terms, CoUR enables a more efficient and robust search for optimal reward feedback. We comprehensively evaluate CoUR across nine original environments from IsaacGym and all 20 tasks from the Bidexterous Manipulation benchmark. The experimental results demonstrate that CoUR not only achieves better performance but also significantly lowers the cost of reward evaluations.
title_zh: 大型语言模型强化学习中的不确定奖励链
abstract_zh: 设计有效的奖励函数是强化学习（RL）的核心，但这一过程仍然充满挑战且耗时费力，原因在于传统方法固有的低效性和不一致性。现有方法通常依赖大量手动设计与评估步骤，容易产生冗余，并忽视中间决策点的局部不确定性。为解决这些问题，我们提出了链式不确定奖励（Chain of Uncertain Rewards, CoUR）框架，该框架引入大型语言模型（LLMs），以简化强化学习环境中的奖励函数设计与评估流程。具体而言，CoUR通过结合文本与语义分析的相似性选择机制，实现代码层面的不确定性量化，从而识别并复用最相关的奖励函数组件。通过减少重复评估，并对解耦的奖励项采用贝叶斯优化，CoUR能够更高效、更稳健地搜索最优奖励反馈。我们在 IsaacGym 的九个原创环境以及 Bidexterous Manipulation 基准测试中的全部 20 个任务上对 CoUR 进行了全面评估。实验结果表明，CoUR 不仅在性能上表现更优，还显著降低了奖励评估的成本。

title: Zero-shot Evaluation of Deep Learning for Java Code Clone Detection
authors: Thomas S. Heinze
abstract: Deep Learning (DL) is becoming more and more widespread in clone detection, motivated by achieving near-perfect performance for this task. In particular in case of semantic code clones, which share only limited syntax but implement the same or similar functionality, Deep Learning appears to outperform conventional tools. In this paper, we want to investigate the generalizability of DL-based clone detectors for Java. We therefore replicate and evaluate the performance of five state-of-the-art DL-based clone detectors, including Transformers like CodeBERT and single-task models like FA-AST+GMN, in a zero-shot evaluation scenario, where we train/fine-tune and evaluate on different datasets and functionalities. Our experiments demonstrate that the models' generalizability to unseen code is limited. Further analysis reveals that the conventional clone detector NiCad even outperforms the DL-based clone detectors in such a zero-shot evaluation scenario.
title_zh: 深度学习在Java代码克隆检测中的零样本评估
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）在克隆检测中的应用正变得越来越广泛，这主要得益于其在该任务中实现近乎完美的性能。特别是在语义代码克隆方面——这类克隆仅具有有限的语法相似性，但实现了相同或类似的功能——深度学习方法似乎优于传统的检测工具。本文旨在研究基于深度学习的克隆检测器在Java语言上的泛化能力。为此，我们复现并评估了五种最先进的基于深度学习的克隆检测器的性能，包括CodeBERT等Transformer模型以及FA-AST+GMN等单任务模型，在零样本评估场景下进行训练/微调和评估，即在不同数据集和功能上进行训练与测试。实验结果表明，这些模型对未见过代码的泛化能力有限。进一步分析显示，在这种零样本评估场景中，传统克隆检测器NiCad的表现甚至优于基于深度学习的检测器。

title: Supply Chain Attacks in Cloud Native Web Applications
authors: Thoufeeq Ahamed, Akash Saminathan, Balasubramanian Prabhu Kavin
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computational Intelligence, Security, and Artificial Intelligence (IntelliSecAI)
abstract: One of the biggest cybersecurity risks in recent years has been supply chain attacks using cloud-native web applications. North Korea launched an attack in mid-2025 that used fictitious job interviews to release 67 malicious NPM packages, resulting in over 17,000 downloads and infecting developer computers with malware families like BeaverTail, XORIndex Loader, HexEval, and InvisibleFerret. Because the attack reveals untrusted third-party dependencies that have the potential to infect entire ecosystems, it highlights the vulnerability of contemporary CI/CD pipelines. Here, we present an AI-Augmented Dependency Trust Verification Framework that integrates three defense in-depth layers: sandboxed verification at runtime prior to being added in cloud-native build pipelines; static and dynamic AI-powered malware detection as the initial indication of suspicious code patterns; and cryptographic package signing and provenance veerification at the Supply-chain Levels for Software Artifacts (SLSA) and Sigstore levels. To combat social engineering attack vectors, the framework also includes zero-trust developer onboarding guidelines. With the suppression of unsigned dependencies, obfuscated payload detection, and enforcement against malicious action exe- cution, the study demonstrates that the multi-layered protection would have easily destroyed the North Korean NPM attack. The system offers a useful template for cloud-native applications' software supply chain security.
title_zh: 云原生Web应用中的供应链攻击
abstract_zh: 近年来最大的网络安全风险之一，便是利用云原生Web应用程序的供应链攻击。2025年年中，朝鲜发起了一次攻击，通过虚构的求职面试方式，发布了67个恶意NPM包，导致超过17,000次下载，并在开发人员计算机上感染了BeaverTail、XORIndex Loader、HexEval和InvisibleFerret等恶意软件家族。该攻击暴露了不受信任的第三方依赖项可能污染整个生态系统的潜在风险，凸显了现代CI/CD流水线的脆弱性。本文提出一种AI增强型依赖信任验证框架，集成三层纵深防御机制：在云原生构建流水线中添加前，于运行时进行沙箱化验证；通过静态与动态AI驱动的恶意代码检测，作为可疑代码模式的初步预警；以及在软件物料供应链层级（SLSA）和Sigstore层级实施加密包签名与来源验证。为应对社会工程学攻击向量，该框架还包含零信任开发者入职指南。通过阻止未签名依赖项、检测混淆载荷以及防范恶意行为执行，本研究证明，这种多层防护体系足以轻易挫败此次朝鲜的NPM攻击。该系统为云原生应用的软件供应链安全提供了一个极具价值的参考模板。

title: A Review on FPGA Based Real Time Sobel Edge Detection for Medical Imaging Using PYNQ-Z2
authors: A. Manonmani, U. DhanushKumar, B. Kelvin Jacob
publish: 2025 International Conference on Electrical, Communication, and Computing Technologies (iCONECCT)
abstract: The use of edge detection to identify diagnostic features in an X-ray is a critical initial processing step in medical imaging, increasing the number of diagnostically meaningful objects, including bone fractures in X-ray images. Previous literature has shown the usefulness of FPGA-based accelerators in medical imaging applications, such as Sobel, Canny edge detection, because they are inherently parallel and have low latency relative to a CPU or GPU-based implementation. Based on these methods, this paper outlines a hardware implementation of a Sobel based edge detector with pixel enhancement on the PYNQ-Z2 FPGA using Verilog HDL. The given design takes X- ray data in grayscale format and provides the refined results to a display device. The FPGA implementation is resource efficient and provides real-time performance comparatively to conventional software-based techniques and therefore is a cost effective solution to portable diagnostic system development. This paper will show that reconfigurable hardware can be used to support medical imaging applications by offering preprocessing of high speed and low power that can be used in point of care healthcare facilities.
title_zh: 基于PYNQ-Z2的FPGA实时Sobel边缘检测在医学成像中的应用综述
abstract_zh: 利用边缘检测技术识别X射线图像中的诊断特征，是医学影像处理中至关重要的初始步骤，能够显著增加具有诊断意义的物体数量，包括X射线图像中的骨折等。以往的研究表明，基于FPGA的加速器在医学影像应用中具有显著优势，例如Sobel、Canny等边缘检测算法，因其天然并行性以及相对于CPU或GPU实现的低延迟特性而备受青睐。基于这些方法，本文提出了一种基于Sobel的边缘检测器的硬件实现方案，该方案在PYNQ-Z2 FPGA平台上通过Verilog HDL完成，并集成了像素增强功能。所设计的系统接收灰度格式的X射线数据，并将优化后的结果输出至显示设备。该FPGA实现方案资源利用率高，相较于传统的软件方法具备实时性能，因此为便携式诊断系统的开发提供了一种成本效益高的解决方案。本文还表明，可重构硬件能够有效支持医学影像应用，通过提供高速、低功耗的预处理能力，适用于临床现场（Point of Care）医疗设施。

title: Operational Testing and Error Budget Management in the Architecture for Large Language Models Integrated Systems
authors: Sergey V. Makshakov, Valentina G. Sidorenko
publish: 2025 International Conference on Quality Management, Transport and Information Security, Information Technologies (QM&amp;TIS&amp;IT)
abstract: The integration of large language models (LLMs) into information systems requires new architectural solutions to ensure security, reliability, and quality control. This paper analyzes vulnerabilities and testing challenges specific to LLMintegrated systems. We propose a new class of architecture tailored for LLM usage, based on a microservice paradigm with a centralized orchestrator. Special attention is given to operational testing as an architectural component for identifying defects in real-world environments, and to the use of fault budgets as a dynamic quality control mechanism. This approach enhances system adaptability and resilience under real-world usage and rapid AI evolution.
title_zh: 大型语言模型集成系统架构中的操作测试与误差预算管理
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLMs）集成到信息系统中，需要新的架构解决方案，以确保安全性、可靠性和质量控制。本文分析了LLM集成系统特有的漏洞及测试挑战。我们提出一种专为LLM使用设计的新一类架构，基于微服务模式，并采用集中式协调器。特别关注将运行时测试作为架构组件，用于在真实环境中识别缺陷，并利用故障预算作为动态质量控制机制。该方法提升了系统在实际应用和快速AI演进环境下的适应性与弹性。

title: Self-Evolving AI Framework for Adaptive Threat Detection in Cloud-Integrated Cyber Environments
authors: Mohit Garg, Isan Sahoo, Vivek Banerjee, Keshav Kaushik, Vijayent Kohli, Mukesh Soni
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Cognitive Computing in Engineering, Communications, Sciences and Biomedical Health Informatics (IC3ECSBHI)
abstract: This paper has discussed a self-improving AIbased model developed for identifying threats in cloud computing environments. The model evolved as it learned on its own after each cycle. The model applied both genetic principles and reinforcement learning in order to adapt quickly to emerging forms of attacks. The simulated results showed the improvement in threat detection accuracy and the decline in false positive alarms over time. The model seemed to be continually operating as a cyber security “brain” that is constantly learning and never stops thinking. The research showed that this model could enhance the defenses of cloud based networks through automated means without requiring a user's intervention; although the model was tested via simulation, the results were very similar to those expected from a live cyber security system.
title_zh: 云集成网络环境中的自演化人工智能框架：用于自适应威胁检测
abstract_zh: 本文讨论了一种基于人工智能的自提升模型，该模型用于识别云计算环境中的威胁。该模型在每次循环后能够自主学习并不断进化。模型结合了遗传学原理与强化学习方法，以快速适应新型攻击形式。模拟结果表明，随着时间推移，威胁检测的准确率不断提高，误报率持续下降。该模型似乎始终如一地扮演着网络安全“大脑”的角色，持续学习，永不停止思考。研究显示，该模型可通过自动化手段显著增强基于云的网络防御能力，且无需用户干预；尽管该模型仅通过仿真进行测试，但其结果与实际网络安全系统预期表现极为相似。

title: Building Trust in Smart Cities: A Secure, On-Premise AI Chatbot for Urban Planning Applications
authors: Avraam Bardos, Theoktisti Marinopoulou, Antonios Lalas, Konstantinos Votis
publish: 2025 IEEE Afro-Mediterranean Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AMCAI)
abstract: The rise of large-scale language models has reshaped the landscape of natural language processing (NLP), transforming how users interact with information. While widely known services such as ChatGPT have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across many domains, their dependence on cloudbased infrastructure can often raise concerns about privacy, customization, and operational flexibility. In this work, we present Regulation Extractor Assistant (Rexa), a locally-based chatbot leveraging retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) to extract and interact with regulatory and planning documents. Rexa combines file processing, vector-based retrieval, and structured prompt engineering to deliver accurate and context-aware responses. This approach supports transparency and data security, which are critical in scenarios such as urban planning and regulation. Our experiments, conducted on an in-house dataset of questions based on an urban planning document, demonstrate that Rexa outperforms leading commercial chatbots across multiple metrics, even when those chatbots are guided by Rexa's optimized prompts. These findings underscore the value of domain-specific, adaptable AI-tools in supporting reliable and informed decision-making.
title_zh: 在智慧城市中建立信任：面向城市规划应用的可信、本地部署人工智能聊天机器人
abstract_zh: 大规模语言模型的兴起重塑了自然语言处理（NLP）领域的格局，改变了用户获取和交互信息的方式。尽管像ChatGPT这样的知名服务在多个领域展现了卓越的能力，但其对云端基础设施的依赖常常引发人们对隐私保护、定制化需求以及操作灵活性的担忧。本文提出了一款基于本地部署的聊天机器人——监管文件提取助手（Regulation Extractor Assistant, Rexa），该系统利用检索增强生成（RAG）技术，实现对法规与规划文档的高效提取与交互。Rexa通过结合文件处理、基于向量的检索以及结构化提示工程，能够提供准确且上下文感知的响应。这一方法有效保障了透明性与数据安全，尤其适用于城市规划与法规管理等对安全性要求较高的场景。我们在基于一份城市规划文档构建的内部数据集上开展实验，结果表明，即便在使用Rexa优化后的提示词引导下，Rexa仍显著优于主流商业聊天机器人，在多项评估指标上表现更优。这些发现凸显了领域专用、可灵活调整的AI工具在支持可靠、科学决策方面的巨大价值。

title: Distributional Information Embedding: A Framework for Multi-Bit Watermarking
authors: Haiyun He, Yepeng Liu, Ziqiao Wang, Yongyi Mao, Yuheng Bu
publish: 2025 Asia Pacific Workshop on Data Science and Information Theory (APWDSIT)
abstract: This paper introduces a novel problem, distributional information embedding, motivated by the practical demands of multi-bit watermarking for large language models (LLMs). Unlike traditional information embedding, which embeds information into a pre-existing host signal, LLM watermarking actively controls the text generation process-adjusting the token distribution-to embed a detectable signal. We develop an information-theoretic framework to analyze this distributional information embedding problem, characterizing the fundamental trade-offs among three critical performance metrics: text quality, detectability, and information rate. In the asymptotic regime, we demonstrate that the maximum achievable rate with vanishing error corresponds to the entropy of the LLM's output distribution and increases with higher allowable distortion. We also characterize the optimal watermarking scheme to achieve this rate. Extending the analysis to the finite-token case with non-i.i.d. tokens, we identify schemes that maximize detection probability while adhering to constraints on false alarm and distortion.
title_zh: 分布信息嵌入：一种多比特水印的框架
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新的问题——分布信息嵌入，其动机源于大语言模型（LLMs）多比特水印技术的实际需求。与传统信息嵌入将信息嵌入到已有宿主信号不同，大语言模型水印通过主动调控文本生成过程——调整词元分布——来嵌入可检测的信号。我们构建了一个信息论框架，用于分析这一分布信息嵌入问题，刻画了三个关键性能指标之间的基本权衡关系：文本质量、可检测性以及信息速率。在渐近情形下，我们证明了在误差趋于零的情况下所能达到的最大速率等于大语言模型输出分布的熵，并且该速率随允许失真度的增加而提高。同时，我们还确定了实现该速率的最优水印方案。进一步地，我们将分析扩展至有限词元数量且词元非独立同分布的情形，识别出在误报率和失真度约束条件下能够最大化检测概率的水印方案。

title: Smart Contract Implementation in Web-Based E-Voting Systems: Blockchain Security and Transparency Analysis
authors: Bryan Liem, Vincent Nicholas Hie, Zulfany Erlisa Rasjid
publish: 2025 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Blockchain, Cloud Computing, and Data Analytics (ICoABCD)
abstract: Traditional e-voting systems face critical challenges that undermine their security, transparency, and integrity, including data manipulation and vote fraud. This study addresses these issues by proposing a novel, blockchain based solution designed to enforce election rules securely without centralized control. We design and implement a web based e-voting prototype using smart contracts on the Ethereum blockchain, leveraging a decentralized stack that integrates React, MetaMask, Ethers.js, and Hardhat. While previous research has explored blockchain for e-voting, many studies focus on architecture but lack a comprehensive security analysis of the underlying smart contracts. Our key contribution lies in a rigorous, multi-faceted security analysis that validates the system's robustness. We employed static analysis with Slither, which successfully identified and mitigated specific timestamp dependency vulnerabilities, ensuring code quality. Furthermore, we achieved a 100% statement, function, and line coverage through unit testing by executing 25 test cases in under one second, and conducted extensive fuzz testing with Echidna, which reported no invariant violations. The results confirm the system's ability to ensure voter anonymity through cryptographic hashing, prevent double-voting, and maintain the immutability of the ballot ledger, directly addressing the vulnerabilities found in conventional systems. This research not only provides a practical, verifiable solution for secure e-voting but also establishes a robust methodology for auditing the security of smart contracts in high-stakes applications.
title_zh: 基于区块链的电子投票系统中智能合约的实现：安全与透明性分析
abstract_zh: 传统电子投票系统面临诸多严峻挑战，严重威胁其安全性、透明性和完整性，包括数据篡改和选票欺诈等问题。本研究提出了一种基于区块链的创新解决方案，旨在在无需中心化控制的前提下，安全地执行选举规则。我们设计并实现了一个基于Web的电子投票原型系统，利用以太坊区块链上的智能合约，构建于一个去中心化的技术栈之上，集成了React、MetaMask、Ethers.js和Hardhat等工具。尽管先前的研究已探索将区块链应用于电子投票，但多数工作仅关注系统架构，缺乏对底层智能合约的全面安全分析。本研究的核心贡献在于开展了一项严谨且多维度的安全性分析，充分验证了系统的鲁棒性。我们采用Slither进行静态分析，成功识别并修复了特定的时间戳依赖漏洞，保障了代码质量。此外，通过执行25个测试用例，在不到一秒的时间内实现了100%的语句、函数和行覆盖率，并使用Echidna进行了广泛的模糊测试，未发现任何不变量违规情况。实验结果表明，该系统能够通过密码学哈希确保选民匿名性，有效防止重复投票，并保持选票记录的不可篡改性，直接解决了传统系统中存在的各类漏洞。本研究不仅为安全电子投票提供了一个可实践、可验证的解决方案，还建立了一套适用于高风险应用场景中智能合约安全审计的可靠方法论。

title: Spartan-7 FPGA Based Implementation of ChaCha20 Accelerator for RISC-V Systems
authors: Yusuf Ahmad, Kamlesh Kumar Singh
publish: 2026 2nd International Conference on Cognitive Computing in Engineering, Communications, Sciences and Biomedical Health Informatics (IC3ECSBHI)
abstract: ChaCha20 is a stream cipher widely adopted in modern communication systems due to its simplicity and strong cryptographic properties. While software implementations are common, hardware acceleration is often required in embedded and resource constrained systems to meet performance and power constraints. This work presents a register transfer level implementation of a ChaCha20 encryption core designed with an emphasis on low dynamic power consumption. The proposed design employs a serialized 32 bit data path, reducing switching activity at the cost of increased latency, which is acceptable for low throughput and control oriented applications. The architecture is organized around a memory mapped interface to support integration as a peripheral accelerator in processor based systems. The design is described entirely at the RTL level and evaluated through synthesis and power analysis. Implementation results are used to examine the impact of architectural trade offs on power, timing, and resource utilization without modifying the underlying cryptographic algorithm.
title_zh: 基于Spartan-7 FPGA的RISC-V系统ChaCha20加速器实现
abstract_zh: ChaCha20是一种流密码，因其简洁性与强大的密码学特性，被广泛应用于现代通信系统中。尽管软件实现较为常见，但在嵌入式及资源受限的系统中，为满足性能和功耗要求，通常需要硬件加速。本文提出了一种在寄存器传输级（RTL）实现的ChaCha20加密核心设计，重点在于降低动态功耗。该设计采用串行化的32位数据通路，在增加延迟的同时减少了开关活动，这一权衡对于低吞吐量且以控制为主的场景是可接受的。架构围绕一个内存映射接口组织，便于作为外设加速器集成到基于处理器的系统中。整个设计完全在RTL层面描述，并通过综合与功耗分析进行评估。实现结果用于分析不同架构折衷对功耗、时序和资源利用率的影响，而无需修改底层的密码算法。

title: Security Dilemma in Software Development: A Case Study on Understanding Developer Priorities and Practices in Stack Overflow
authors: Umar Albalawi, Mohammed Mustafa
publish: 2025 International Conference on Sustainable Technology and Engineering (i-COSTE)
abstract: Applications have advanced rapidly in recent years, taking software development to a whole new level. These advancements have led to a growth in the complexity of applications, cloud computing, and the Internet of Things (IoT). As a result of this improvement, software security has become a concern for developers, but it has traditionally been overlooked. But now, security issues are evolving day by day. In this paper, we explore developer priorities and practices in term of security in Stack Overflow website, whether they implement their software with security in mind or not. We utilize the Stack Exchange Data Dump to collect and compile a dataset of questions and their corresponding answers related to security vulnerabilities, specifically those that include user-submitted programming code snippets, our analysis concentrates on security-related topics. The experimental results indicate that Python emerged as the most commonly used language for security code snippets across these topics. From the expanded sample of code snippets, several vulnerabilities are flagged for security issues.
title_zh: 软件开发中的安全困境：一项关于理解开发者优先事项与实践的Stack Overflow案例研究
abstract_zh: 近年来，应用程序发展迅速，将软件开发推向了全新的高度。这些进步导致应用、云计算以及物联网（IoT）的复杂性显著增加。由于这一发展，软件安全问题已成为开发者关注的重点，但长期以来一直被忽视。然而，如今安全问题正日益演变。本文通过分析Stack Overflow网站上开发者对安全问题的关注程度与实践情况，探讨他们是否在开发软件时将安全放在首位。我们利用Stack Exchange数据转储（Data Dump）收集并整理了一个包含安全漏洞相关问题及其对应答案的数据集，特别聚焦于那些包含用户提交的编程代码片段的问题，研究重点为安全相关主题。实验结果表明，在这些主题中，Python是使用最广泛的用于安全代码片段的编程语言。通过对扩展样本中的代码片段进行分析，我们识别出多个存在安全漏洞的情况。

title: PCB Defect Localization and Classification Using Deep Learning
authors: Ranjan Kumar H S, Shabana S, Chinmai Shetty, Kiran Puttegowda
publish: 2025 International Conference on Emerging Technologies in Electronics and Green Energy (ICETEG)
abstract: Production defects have been a constant problem with high-volume manufacturing of Printed Circuit Boards (PCBs) as the consumer electronics market has attracted increased demand in the last couple of decades. Such defects, such as excess copper, short circuits and open circuits, may cause waste of the material as well as making PCBs unusable. Manual inspection procedures that are normally conducted on a predetermined schedule no longer meet the production specifications to an extent that makes automated inspection techniques necessary. AVI is an emerging strategy of defect screening because it allows non-obstructive observation in the manufacturing process. This paper presents a U-NET modelbased method to localise and classify PCB defects. This model is used to conduct semantic segmentation to detect and categorise defects at the pixel level with the power to localise and label defect-types. Experimental verification on Deep PCB dataset shows that the proposed solution has a high precision of 97.3 per cent, a recall of 96.7 per cent, and F1-score of 96.0. To achieve greater efficiency, the model size is further trimmed using a lowweight pruning strategy, which roughly achieves a threefold reduction in size to 2.4 MB and maintains high accuracy. The outlined framework provides a flexible and powerful approach to real-time deficiency detection in PCB manufacturing processes in the contemporary manufacturing space.
title_zh: 基于深度学习的PCB缺陷定位与分类
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年中，随着消费电子市场对印刷电路板（PCB）需求的不断增长，高产量制造过程中的生产缺陷问题一直存在。诸如铜过量、短路和开路等缺陷不仅会造成材料浪费，还可能导致PCB无法使用。传统的按预定时间表进行的人工检测方法已无法满足当前的生产标准，因此必须采用自动化检测技术。自动视觉检测（AVI）作为一种新兴的缺陷筛查策略，因其能够在不干扰制造流程的情况下实现非侵入式观察而受到关注。本文提出了一种基于U-NET模型的方法，用于定位和分类PCB缺陷。该模型通过语义分割技术，在像素级别上实现缺陷的检测与分类，具备精确定位并标注缺陷类型的能力。在Deep PCB数据集上的实验验证表明，所提出的方案具有97.3%的高精度、96.7%的召回率以及96.0的F1分数。为进一步提升效率，采用轻量级剪枝策略对模型尺寸进行了优化，使模型大小约为原体积的三分之一，降至2.4 MB，同时保持了较高的准确率。该框架为现代制造业中的PCB生产过程提供了灵活且强大的实时缺陷检测解决方案。

title: Calibration Machine Implementation for Fine Phase Control Adjustment in Phase Interpolator Using a Discrete Current Modulation Profile
authors: Erick J. Arenas Mendoza, Iurhitsi Elias Valdez, Ernesto Conde Almada, Rodrigo Jaramillo Ramirez
publish: 2025 IEEE Latin American Electron Devices Conference (LAEDC)
abstract: This paper presents a digital Calibration Machine (CM) architecture designed to improve the linearity of a 127step phase interpolator with coarse and fine control topology by the means of the adjustment of biasing current per code in the Discrete Modulation Profile (DMP). The digital design flow covers from coarse/fine control technique until CM layout implementation. The CM process has two different operations, which are calibration and characterization. In calibration mode, the CM saves the data for fine-control adjustment through the DMP. The second operation, characterization, is used to determine the order in which the codes obtained in calibration are turned on. The digital control was designed in Verilog and implemented in 130 nm SkyWater technology using the OpenROAD workflow from RTL-to-GDSII. Input stimuli are provided by a Time-toDigital Converter (TDC), which measures phase offsets between ideal timing references and the interpolated output, forming a closed-loop feedback mechanism for calibration.
title_zh: 基于离散电流调制轮廓的相位插值器中精细相位控制调整的校准机实现
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种数字校准机（CM）架构，旨在通过调整离散调制轮廓（DMP）中每个码字对应的偏置电流，改善具有粗细控制拓扑结构的127步相位插值器的线性度。该数字设计流程涵盖了从粗/细控制技术到CM版图实现的全过程。CM的工作过程包含两种不同操作：校准与表征。在校准模式下，CM通过DMP保存用于细控制调整的数据；第二项操作——表征，则用于确定校准过程中获得的各码字开启的顺序。数字控制部分采用Verilog语言设计，并基于OpenROAD工作流，在130 nm SkyWater工艺中完成从RTL到GDSII的实现。输入激励由时间到数字转换器（TDC）提供，其用于测量理想时序参考与插值输出之间的相位偏移，从而形成闭环反馈机制以实现校准。

title: Making Zero-Days Hard: A Deployment-Oriented Review of Preventive Defences
authors: Praneeth Kasiraju, Harshak Golusu, Balasubramanian Prabhu Kavin
publish: 2025 International Conference on Computational Intelligence, Security, and Artificial Intelligence (IntelliSecAI)
abstract: Exploitation of previously unjammed vulnerabilities in functioning environments is known as zero-day exploitation and is a constant challenge in the cybersecurity arena. This review focuses on the various preventative approaches implemented from March 2022 up to July 2025, divided in eight different categories at the eight different levels that range from design-time, runtime and operational level. Case studies are taken from across the board of Android, Chrome, Windows, Linux, the Apple platform, the financial sector, and how the changes in the use of memory safe languages, compiler based and hardware based protections, architectural isolation, proactive bug discovery, supply chain controls and operational mitigations are changing the nature of the defensive posture. The analysis also presents persistent challenges, such as the use of mitigations in runtime, issues with reproducibility and lack of automation for enforcement of SBOM/VEX. Overall, the review sets a general trend: prevention is no longer an add-on, but rather it is a basic principle of secure system design. While issues of memory safety are decreasing, logical loopholes, supply chain gaps and phishing attacks are becoming more common impacting ways to implement adaptable, proactive defenses. This review provides a deployment facing synthesis of preventive measures using a lifecycle taxonomy to systematically provide a organization of recent platform rolls, adoption barriers, and measurable impacts. It further highlights open challenges which require further advancement in order to effectively address the zero day exploitation.
title_zh: 让零日漏洞难以利用：面向部署的预防性防御措施综述
abstract_zh: 在实际运行环境中利用此前未被发现的漏洞进行攻击，被称为零日漏洞利用，这一直是网络安全领域持续面临的挑战。本综述聚焦于2022年3月至2025年7月期间所实施的各种预防性措施，这些措施按八个不同类别划分，并覆盖从设计阶段、运行时到操作层面的八个不同层级。案例研究涵盖Android、Chrome、Windows、Linux、苹果平台以及金融行业等多个领域，分析了内存安全语言的使用变化、基于编译器和硬件的防护机制、架构隔离、主动漏洞发现、供应链管控以及操作层面缓解措施等手段如何改变防御态势的本质。分析还揭示了持续存在的挑战，例如运行时缓解措施的应用问题、可复现性不足，以及SBOM/VEX（软件物料清单/漏洞评估）强制执行缺乏自动化等问题。总体而言，本综述呈现出一个明确趋势：预防已不再是一种附加功能，而是安全系统设计的基本原则。尽管内存安全问题逐渐减少，逻辑漏洞、供应链薄弱环节以及网络钓鱼攻击却日益增多，对构建灵活且前瞻性的防御体系带来了新的影响。本文通过生命周期分类法，对预防性措施进行了面向部署的综合梳理，系统地组织了近期平台演进、采纳障碍及可衡量的影响。同时，也指出了若干亟待进一步突破的开放性挑战，以有效应对零日漏洞利用问题。

title: Edge-Cloud Intelligence: Adaptive Circuit Topology Perception System*
authors: Yongzhuo Yu, Changju Wu, Chuanyi Wang, Weiwei Yue
publish: 2025 9th International Conference on Electrical, Mechanical and Computer Engineering (ICEMCE)
abstract: This paper presents an intelligent circuit topology perception system based on a collaborative edgecloud architecture, focusing on algorithmic and model optimization to address challenges in wire connection detection under non-uniform pin layouts and overlapping scenarios. An enhanced YOLOv8n-seg model is deployed at the edge, incorporating a novel dual-stage perspective mapping mechanism that achieves 0.53 mm positioning accuracy. A wire feature enhancement module maintains a 90.4% recognition rate under varying illumination and wire overlaps. Coupled with a dynamic load balancing strategy, the system attains 93.1% wire recognition accuracy and 202 ms end-to-end latency, significantly improving accuracy and efficiency in electronic experiment teaching.
title_zh: 边缘云智能：自适应电路拓扑感知系统*
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于协同边缘-云架构的智能电路拓扑感知系统，重点针对非均匀引脚布局及重叠场景下的导线连接检测难题，开展了算法与模型优化研究。在边缘端部署了改进的YOLOv8n-seg模型，并引入一种新型双阶段视角映射机制，实现了0.53 mm的定位精度。同时，通过设计导线特征增强模块，在不同光照条件和导线重叠情况下仍保持90.4%的识别率。结合动态负载均衡策略，系统整体达到93.1%的导线识别准确率和202 ms的端到端延迟，显著提升了电子实验教学中的检测精度与效率。

title: Evaluating Code Readability in Java-to-Kotlin Migration Using Large Language Models and Static Analysis
authors: Nirel Marie M. Ibarra
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Computer, Data Sciences and Applications (ACDSA)
abstract: This study investigates the effectiveness of large language models (LLMs) as quantitative evaluators of code readability in industrial-scale Java-to-Kotlin migrations. Focusing on a production Android MVVM repository, the research deploys a cross-validated methodological framework using ChatGPT-5 and Gemini-2.5 Pro, triangulated against established static analysis metrics. By systematically comparing legacy Java and refactored Kotlin code through multi-run LLM scoring and structural complexity measures, the study demonstrates that Kotlin migration yields substantial improvements in cognitive readability. The framework also achieves strong reliability through agreement between models and statistical controls. Practical implications include using LLM-driven analytics in continuous integration pipelines to monitor maintainability, guide refactoring, and reduce technical debt. The findings support an objective and scalable approach to assessing code quality and readability, providing a blueprint for modern software analytics during language and architectural transitions.
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型与静态分析评估 Java 到 Kotlin 迁移中的代码可读性
abstract_zh: 本研究探讨了大型语言模型（LLMs）作为量化评估工业级 Java 到 Kotlin 迁移代码可读性的有效性。研究聚焦于一个生产环境中的 Android MVVM 仓库，采用基于 ChatGPT-5 和 Gemini-2.5 Pro 的交叉验证方法论框架，并与已有的静态分析指标进行三角验证。通过多次运行 LLM 评分及结构复杂度度量，系统比较遗留的 Java 代码与重构后的 Kotlin 代码，研究结果表明，Kotlin 迁移显著提升了代码的认知可读性。该框架还通过模型间的一致性以及统计控制手段实现了较强的可靠性。实际应用意义在于，可将 LLM 驱动的分析工具集成至持续集成流水线中，用于监控代码可维护性、指导重构工作并降低技术债务。研究结果支持了一种客观且可扩展的代码质量与可读性评估方法，为语言和架构转型过程中的现代软件分析提供了可借鉴的范式。

title: Cybersecurity Compliance for Operational Technology using Large Language Models
authors: Regan Bolton, Mohammadreza Sheikhfathollahi, Simon Parkinson, Dan Basher, Howard Parkinson
publish: IEEE Open Journal of the Computer Society
abstract: Operational Technology Cybersecurity (OTCS) continues to be a dominant challenge for critical infrastructure such as rail. As these systems are vulnerable to malicious attacks, effective documentation and development processes are essential to perform compliance assessments and proactively protect systems. In addition to maintaining compliance, it is also necessary to periodically evaluate the design documentation to account for the evolution of cybersecurity standards and threats. In this paper, a system is proposed that uses Large Language Models (LLMs) and multi-stage retrieval to enhance the compliance verification process. Initially, a basic architecture named baseline compliance architecture (BCA) is evaluated to answer OTCS compliance queries. After this, the extended approach is defined, which is called parallel compliance architecture (PCA). The performance of OpenAI-gpt-4o and Claude-3.5-haiku models is compared when used in the pipeline against the relative performance of the BCA. A discussion of their responses is provided and, through empirical evaluation, it is observed that PCA can score 0.1 points higher in correctness and 0.55 points higher in reasoning than BCA.
title_zh: 使用大型语言模型实现工业技术的网络安全合规
abstract_zh: 运营技术网络安全（OTCS）对于铁路等关键基础设施而言，依然是一个主要挑战。由于这些系统易受恶意攻击，因此建立有效的文档编制与开发流程至关重要，以支持合规性评估并主动保护系统安全。除了确保持续合规外，还需定期审查设计文档，以应对网络安全标准和威胁形势的不断演变。本文提出一种新系统，利用大语言模型（LLMs）与多阶段检索技术，提升合规性验证效率。首先，对一种基础架构——“基准合规架构”（Baseline Compliance Architecture, BCA）进行评估，用于回答OTCS合规性相关问题；随后，提出扩展方案，即“并行合规架构”（Parallel Compliance Architecture, PCA）。本文对比了OpenAI的gpt-4o模型与Claude-3.5-haiku模型在该流程中的表现，并与BCA进行了性能比较。通过对模型响应的分析发现，通过实证评估，PCA在正确性方面比BCA高出0.1分，在推理能力方面则高出0.55分。

title: PoTable: Towards Systematic Thinking via Plan-then-Execute Stage Reasoning on Tables
authors: Qingyang Mao, Qi Liu, Zhi Li, Mingyue Cheng, Zheng Zhang, Rui Li
publish: IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering
abstract: In recent years, table reasoning has garnered substantial research interest, particularly regarding its integration with Large Language Models (LLMs), which have revolutionized natural language applications. Existing LLM-based studies typically achieve step-by-step thinking for table reasoning guided by task semantics. While these approaches emphasize autonomous exploration and enhance fine-grained table understanding, they often overlook systematic thinking in the reasoning process. This oversight can lead to omitted steps, disorganized logic and misleading results, especially in complex scenarios. In this paper, we propose <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small>, a novel stage-oriented plan-then-execute approach that incorporates systematic thinking into table reasoning. Specifically, <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> involves several distinct analytical stages with clear objectives to provide adequate guidance. To accomplish stage-specific goals, <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> employs a plan-then-execute mechanism: it first plans the operation chain based on the stage objective, and then executes operations sequentially through code generation, real-time running and feedback processing. Consequently, <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> produces reliable table reasoning results with highly accurate, step-wise commented and completely executable programs. It mirrors the workflow of a professional data analyst, offering advantages in both accuracy and explainability. Finally, we conduct extensive experiments on four datasets from the WikiTQ and TabFact benchmarks, where the results demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency and explainability of <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small>. Our code is available at: <uri xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">https://github.com/Double680/PoTable</uri>.
title_zh: PoTable：通过“先规划后执行”阶段推理实现表格上的系统性思维
abstract_zh: 近年来，表格推理引起了广泛的研究关注，尤其是在与大型语言模型（LLMs）结合方面，后者已彻底改变了自然语言处理的应用格局。现有的基于LLM的研究通常通过任务语义引导实现逐步推理，虽然这些方法强调自主探索并提升了对表格的细粒度理解，但往往忽视了推理过程中的系统性思维。这种疏忽可能导致步骤遗漏、逻辑混乱以及误导性结果，尤其在复杂场景下更为明显。本文提出一种名为 <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> 的新型分阶段“先规划后执行”方法，将系统性思维融入表格推理中。具体而言，<sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> 包含多个具有明确目标的分析阶段，为推理过程提供充分指导。为实现各阶段的目标，<sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> 采用“先规划后执行”的机制：首先根据阶段目标规划操作链，随后通过代码生成、实时运行和反馈处理，按序执行各项操作。因此，<sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> 能够生成高度准确、步骤清晰且完全可执行的程序，输出可靠的表格推理结果。该方法模拟专业数据分析师的工作流程，在准确性与可解释性方面均展现出显著优势。最后，我们在 WikiTQ 和 TabFact 基准的四个数据集上进行了大量实验，结果表明 <sc xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">PoTable</small> 具有出色的性能、效率和可解释性。我们的代码已开源，地址为：<uri xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">https://github.com/Double680/PoTable</uri>。

title: Design and Implementation of a Software Metrics Dashboard for Quality Assurance Automation
authors: Shiva Tyagi, Tannu Kumari, Someshwar Prasad Gupta
publish: 2026 International Conference on Computing, Sciences and Communications (ICCSC)
abstract: Ensuring software quality is often hindered by fragmented tools and scattered reports. This study proposes an integrated Software Metrics Dashboard for QA that combines key quality and operational metrics-including defect density, test coverage, resolution time, release stability, and system uptime-into a unified platform. Data is gathered from sources like Jira, Confluence, XRAY, and ServiceNow, while OpenCVbased visual analysis enhances detection of UI inconsistencies. The modular PRIME ETL architecture enables efficient metric extraction, transformation, and visualization. By integrating multiple metrics and visual inspections, the dashboard provides a comprehensive view of software health. A review of 60 studies on dynamic metrics (1992-2011) demonstrates their growing importance in software quality. The dashboard supports datadriven decisions, process optimization, and continuous improvement in software development.
title_zh: 软件度量仪表板的设计与实现：质量保证自动化
abstract_zh: 确保软件质量常常受到工具分散和报告零散的阻碍。本研究提出了一种集成的软件度量仪表板（QA），将关键的质量与运营指标——包括缺陷密度、测试覆盖率、问题解决时间、发布稳定性以及系统可用时间——整合到一个统一平台中。数据来源于Jira、Confluence、XRAY和ServiceNow等系统，同时采用基于OpenCV的视觉分析技术，以增强对用户界面不一致性的检测能力。模块化的PRIME ETL架构实现了度量数据的高效提取、转换与可视化。通过整合多种度量指标与视觉检查，该仪表板为软件健康状况提供了全面的视图。对1992至2011年间60项关于动态度量的研究回顾表明，这些度量在软件质量中的重要性日益提升。该仪表板支持数据驱动决策、流程优化以及软件开发过程的持续改进。

title: How Secure is a High-Performance RISC-V Core? A Spectre V1 Case Study on XiangShan Open-Source CPU
authors: Rey Paraula, Roberto Petenzi, Alessandro Bertani, Davide Conficconi
publish: Proceedings of the 19th European Workshop on Systems Security
abstract: None

title: Enhancing Ethereum Smart Contract Security: A Novel Slither-Based Static Analysis Framework
authors: Nasrin Nemati, Nasr Abosata, Usman Butt
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Distributed Ledger Technologies (ICDLT)
abstract: Blockchain technology is evolving rapidly, bringing significant opportunities as well as complex challenges, particularly in the area of smart contract security This paper addresses these challenges by presenting an enhanced version of Slither, a static analysis framework, specifically designed to improve vulnerability detection in Ethereum-based smart contracts. Our contributions target critical vulnerabilities of reentrancy, unchecked call return values, and access control issues, which pose serious threat to decentralized apps (dApps). The enhanced Slither tool incorporates advanced detection methodologies, including refined control-flow analysis, sophisticated pattern recognition, and comprehensive visibility checks. Experimental evaluation demonstrates that this proposed tool significantly improves accuracy, precision, recall, and F1-score across various metrics, while also effectively reducing false positives. This advanced model not only strengthens the security posture of smart contracts but also contributes to fostering a more secure and reliable blockchain ecosystem.
title_zh: 提升以太坊智能合约安全性的新型基于Slither的静态分析框架
abstract_zh: 区块链技术正在迅速发展，带来了巨大的机遇，同时也伴随着复杂的挑战，尤其是在智能合约安全领域。本文针对这些挑战，提出了一种改进版的Slither工具——一种静态分析框架，专门用于提升以太坊智能合约中的漏洞检测能力。我们的工作重点解决重入漏洞、未检查调用返回值以及权限控制问题等关键安全风险，这些问题对去中心化应用（dApps）构成了严重威胁。所提出的增强型Slither工具集成了先进的检测方法，包括优化的控制流分析、复杂的模式识别以及全面的可见性检查机制。实验评估表明，该工具在多个指标上显著提升了检测的准确性、精确率、召回率和F1分数，同时有效降低了误报率。这一先进模型不仅增强了智能合约的安全性，也为构建更加安全、可靠的区块链生态系统做出了重要贡献。

title: Requirements Engineering with Generative AI: Improving Requirements Development Efficiency with Structured Prompt Technique (SPT)
authors: Kavish Nayeem, Kadir Alpaslan Demir, Chandra N. Sekharan, Bozhen Liu
publish: 2026 International Conference on Artificial Intelligence, Computer, Data Sciences and Applications (ACDSA)
abstract: Software requirements development is a crucial part of the software process. Requirements are among the most important artifacts of software projects. However, requirements development is challenging as requirements are commonly developed in natural language. Hence, automation in the requirements development process was limited until recently. Recent advances in Large Language Models (LLMs) and particularly in Generative Artificial Intelligence (GenAI) have created opportunities for software development, especially in areas that involve natural language specifications, such as requirements engineering. In this research, we focus on improving the requirements development efficiency using GenAI and structured prompts. We call this approach the Structured Prompt Technique (SPT). In the software process, the SPT can be used during the requirements development phase after the project vision is defined. For this research, we developed a case study to compare the efficiency that can be achieved in requirements development with 3 different methods: Traditional manual requirements development by humans, automated requirements development with GenAI utilizing conversational prompts, and automated requirements development with GenAI utilizing SPT. For the case study, we developed the requirements for a generic online marketplace application using these 3 different methods. Our research results indicate that we can achieve 8 times improvement in efficiency with automated requirements development with GenAI utilizing conversational prompts, and almost 15 times improvement in efficiency with automated requirements development with GenAI utilizing SPT compared to manual requirements development. Overall, the requirements development with Generative AI has the potential to reduce the traditional manual requirements development process by over <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{9 0 \%}$</tex>. This research shows the significant potential of utilizing GenAI in requirements engineering.
title_zh: 基于生成式人工智能的需求工程：利用结构化提示技术（SPT）提升需求开发效率
abstract_zh: 软件需求开发是软件过程中的关键环节。需求是软件项目中最重要的一类产物之一。然而，由于需求通常以自然语言形式编写，因此需求开发工作具有挑战性，直到最近，该过程的自动化程度仍然有限。近年来，大型语言模型（LLMs）以及生成式人工智能（GenAI）的快速发展，为软件开发带来了新的机遇，尤其是在涉及自然语言规范的领域，如需求工程。在本研究中，我们聚焦于利用生成式人工智能和结构化提示来提升需求开发效率。我们将这一方法称为结构化提示技术（SPT）。在软件开发流程中，SPT可在项目愿景确定后的需求开发阶段使用。为此，我们设计了一个案例研究，比较三种不同方法在需求开发效率方面的表现：传统的人工手动需求开发、利用对话式提示的生成式人工智能自动需求开发，以及利用SPT的生成式人工智能自动需求开发。在该案例研究中，我们采用这三种方法为一个通用的在线市场应用开发了需求文档。研究结果表明，与传统人工方式相比，使用生成式人工智能结合对话式提示可实现效率提升8倍，而采用SPT的生成式人工智能则可实现近15倍的效率提升。总体而言，基于生成式人工智能的需求开发有望将传统的手工需求开发过程减少超过90%。本研究展示了生成式人工智能在需求工程领域所具备的巨大潜力。

title: Baseline Design Method of GB-TomoArcSAR Based on Coding Optimization
authors: Weiming Tian, Kai Yan, Yunkai Deng, Xin Xie, Yuanhao Li
publish: IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Applied Earth Observations and Remote Sensing
abstract: Due to the limitation of lacking elevation resolution, ground-based interferometric radar suffers from serious layover problem when applied to building deformation monitoring. Ground-based tomographic arc-scanning synthetic aperture ra dar (GB-TomoArcSAR) enables tomography by controlling the antenna to scan multiple times in the horizontal plane of different elevation angles to form an arc-shaped synthetic aperture in the elevation direction. However, when GB-TomoArcSAR uses a baseline with uniformly distributed elevation angles, the excessive number of baseline samples leads to the low efficiency of tomog raphy. To address this issue, this paper proposes a tomographic baseline design method based on coding optimization (TBDCO). Firstly, the sampling positions in the elevation direction are bina ry coded. Then, with the elevation resolution and peak side-lobe ratio (PSLR) of the antenna pointing pattern satisfying specific constraints, a quality evaluation model of the tomographic base line is constructed by weighted summation of the sampling num ber and the Cramer Rao bound (CRB) estimation accuracy in the elevation direction. Finally, the genetic algorithm is employed to iteratively solve the optimal coding to achieve sparse design of the tomographic baseline. Validation using both simulated and measured data demonstrates that the proposed method can re duce the number of elevation samples to 42% of the original before optimization while maintaining tomographic performance, substantially shortening the time for collecting measured data.
title_zh: 基于编码优化的GB-TomoArcSAR基线设计方法
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏高程分辨率，地面干涉雷达在建筑物形变监测应用中存在严重的叠掩问题。地面三维层析弧扫描合成孔径雷达（GB-TomoArcSAR）通过控制天线在不同仰角的水平面内多次扫描，在高程方向形成弧形合成孔径，从而实现层析成像。然而，当GB-TomoArcSAR采用均匀分布仰角的基线时，基线样本数量过多，导致成像效率低下。为解决这一问题，本文提出一种基于编码优化的层析基线设计方法（TBDCO）。首先，对高程方向的采样位置进行二进制编码；随后，在满足天线波束指向图高程分辨率和峰值旁瓣比（PSLR）约束条件的前提下，通过加权求和采样点数与高程方向Cramer-Rao界（CRB）估计精度，构建层析基线的质量评价模型；最后，利用遗传算法迭代求解最优编码，实现层析基线的稀疏化设计。通过仿真数据和实测数据的验证表明，所提方法可在保持层析成像性能的同时，将高程采样点数量减少至优化前的42%，显著缩短实测数据采集时间。

title: Intelligent Algorithm Transplant and Verification System
authors: Zhening Dong, Qing Luo, Dongyue Yang, Yang Liu
publish: 2025 9th International Conference on Electrical, Mechanical and Computer Engineering (ICEMCE)
abstract: With the continuous emergence of unmanned platform equipment types and exponential growth in number, the demand for intelligent upgrading of unmanned aerial vehicles, rapid iterative development of intelligent unmanned platforms, tactical combat simulation deduction, etc. is increasing day by day. However, traditional waterfall development system process is lengthy and lacks integrated rapid verification means. Therefore, there is an urgent need to build a new “design-simulation-implementation-test-verification” integrated unmanned platform development system to effectively improve the development iteration speed of unmanned platforms. The intelligent algorithm transplantation and verification systemimplemented in this paper constructsalgorithm analysis component (algorithm interface tool), algorithm function development component, algorithm basic operation tool, algorithm interface conversion development support tool, intelligent algorithm data excitation equipment, intelligent algorithm transplantation running result analysis equipment, and realizes the transplantation of intelligent algorithms in airborne embedded intelligent computing environment.
title_zh: 智能算法移植与验证系统
abstract_zh: 随着无人平台装备类型不断涌现、数量呈指数级增长，对无人机智能化升级、智能无人平台的快速迭代开发、战术作战仿真推演等方面的需求日益迫切。然而，传统的瀑布式系统开发流程周期长，缺乏集成化的快速验证手段。因此，亟需构建一种全新的“设计-仿真-实现-测试-验证”一体化无人平台开发体系，以有效提升无人平台的开发迭代速度。本文所实现的智能算法移植与验证系统，构建了算法分析组件（算法接口工具）、算法功能开发组件、算法基础操作工具、算法接口转换开发支撑工具、智能算法数据激励设备、智能算法移植运行结果分析设备等，实现了在机载嵌入式智能计算环境中的智能算法移植。

title: PhantomPulse: An AI-Based Vulnerability Scanner with Predictive CVSS Scoring using Ensemble Learning
authors: Arij Aissa, Mayssa Emmales, Farah Jemili, Ouajdi Korbaa
publish: 2025 IEEE Afro-Mediterranean Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AMCAI)
abstract: PhantomPulse is an advanced AI-based vulnerability scanner designed to automate both the real-time detection and the prediction of Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) scores for Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) of software vulnerabilities. Utilizing a stacking ensemble of a deep neural network (DNN), LightGBM, and XGBoost, the system leverages natural language processing (NLP) with Term Frequency-Inverse Document Frequency (TF-IDF) vectorization, target encoding, and feature scaling to achieve a test Mean Absolute Error (MAE) of 0.3758 and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{R}^{\mathbf{2}}$</tex> of 0.9242 for CVSS score prediction. Integrated with Nmap for scanning and Streamlit for an intuitive web interface, PhantomPulse delivers actionable reports with description, details, severity levels and CVSS scores. The ensemble model achieves 93.2 % accuracy and 0.92 F1-score for severity classification, outperforming traditional tools like Nessus. This dual approach enhances cybersecurity efficiency by combining predictive modeling with practical scanning, addressing the escalating complexity of cyber threats. Opportunities exist for improving prediction accuracy and integrating the predictive model into PhantomPulse for dynamic scoring.
title_zh: 幽灵脉冲：一种基于人工智能的漏洞扫描器，采用集成学习实现预测性CVSS评分
abstract_zh: PhantomPulse 是一款基于人工智能的高级漏洞扫描工具，旨在自动化实时检测与预测软件漏洞（CVE）的通用漏洞评分系统（CVSS）得分。该系统采用深度神经网络（DNN）、LightGBM 和 XGBoost 的堆叠集成模型，结合自然语言处理（NLP）技术，通过词频-逆文档频率（TF-IDF）向量化、目标编码和特征缩放等方法，实现了 CVSS 得分预测的测试集平均绝对误差（MAE）为 0.3758，决定系数（R²）达 0.9242。系统集成 Nmap 进行漏洞扫描，并利用 Streamlit 构建直观的 Web 界面，可生成包含漏洞描述、详细信息、严重程度等级及 CVSS 得分的可操作报告。其集成模型在严重性分类任务中达到 93.2% 的准确率和 0.92 的 F1 分数，优于传统工具如 Nessus。该双重机制通过将预测建模与实际扫描相结合，显著提升了网络安全防护效率，有效应对日益复杂的网络威胁。未来可通过进一步提升预测精度，并将预测模型深度集成至 PhantomPulse 系统中，实现动态评分功能，从而增强整体安全响应能力。
